deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv, Schertz TX
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42K-$62K. Close May 1, 2026. Building branded property analysis template.
deals.next: Pull MLS comps and RPR report, build analysis sheet, lock template for reuse

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas, Elmendorf TX
deals.notes: Development opportunity. Isaac Linares mobile home project interest (~$150K). Title defect confirmed - incomplete legal description. Chris walking away, signs picked up.

logs.m: Listing canceled. Walking away. Signs picked up from property last week.
Isaac development angle update - 10-acre lots with mobile homes. Josh LT possible partner.
Jennifer Ball (co-owner) contacted - title defect confirmed. Deed needs correction. Van Hutchins engaged as attorney.
Chris updated sisters on showing. Isaac interested in ~$150K development offer with mobile homes - half units for veterans, half for profit.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr, Devine TX
deals.notes: Listing terminated. Sellers moving back in to make updates and repairs. Relist after work complete. Underwater ~$93K-$143K. Short sale was recommended path.

logs.m: Mutual termination - clients moving back in. Plan to relist after updates and repairs. Chandler laid off (hardship doc on file).
Call with Matt and Chandler - honest financial picture shared. Three paths discussed. Leaning toward short sale. Relationship intact.
Market analysis sent - underwater by $93K-$143K. Three options laid out: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close.
Stopped by property. Set landscaping appointment. Waiting on showing agent feedback.

deals.title: Colton & Abby Brown - 485 W FM 462, Moore TX
deals.notes: Divorce - need to sell. 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff ~$257K. Market value $275K-$315K. Recommended list price $295K. CMA pulled May 15.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter, confirm acreage, get listing agreement signed, schedule photos

logs.m: Met at property ~10am. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 2026. CMA pulled - thin market, 3 comps. Built net sheet.
Prior clients from VA renovation loan purchase. Divorce situation. Colton looking for contractor work at 181 CR 7751.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path, San Antonio TX
deals.notes: Listed May 14, $259,900. 3BR/2.5BA, 1,886 sqft, Laura Heights PUD. Sellers relocating NC, June deadline. Multiple showings, second-look buyers very interested. Roof claim pending.
deals.next: Confirm showing time for May 30, follow up with second-look buyers agent, monitor for offers

logs.m: Texted Jose and Katy about investor cash offer $176,300. 4th showing scheduled May 23.
MLS live. First showing 9:15am - cultural concern about direction. Canvassed neighborhood, dropped sign/lockbox.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG (43 photos + floorplans). Going live May 13.
Listing consultation on-site 11am with Isaac Linares. Foundation crack discussed. Payoff discrepancy flagged. Recommended list $259,900.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd, Pleasanton TX
deals.notes: Estate sale, cash transaction $152,000. Military buyer (Sam VanDenheuvel, Exquisite SA). Lien blocker resolved Apr 21. Funded Apr 26, closed Apr 27.
deals.next: Deliver gift basket to Joyce, thank Sam, thank Michael (notary)

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Lien release obtained Apr 21 from Fernando Castillo via mobile notary.
Fernando signed lien release at mobile notary appointment. Release delivered to Chicago Title.
Called Reliable Title - Chelsey Bongiovi confirmed lien prepared at Deeds.com. Chicago Title underwriting: release required or 45-day wait.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo (lien holder family member). Understanding and willing to work with us.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac, Tilden TX
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property, A-735 S-46 E L Taylor. Contract at $113,000 with Espinoza family. Buyer's agent Javier. EMD not yet received. TXR 1903 amendment pending signature. Alyssa Castillo (Chicago Title) is escrow officer.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received, get signed TXR 1903 amendment from Javier, verify Mrs. Espinoza email domain

logs.m: Steve called back. Alejandra sent new T-47 via DocuSign. Steve completed and returned. Waiting on notary requirement confirmation.
New buyers Espinoza family - buyer's agent Javier. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier. EMD not received. Another agent called with backup buyers.
Steve signed amendment. TXR 1404 uploaded to Skyslope. MLS updated to $117,500. Commission box correction still needed.
Clearing complete - Steve finished job and sent photos. First offer basically dead - Michael Rodriguez/RBFCU stalled, no earnest money.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751, Devine TX
deals.notes: Priority Bank REO. Cleanup nearly complete - electric reconnected, flooring this week, water meter pending. Contractor: HouzzPro (Matt Toney). Cameras installed. Listing agreement to be submitted.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD for utility status, replace camera batteries, police report follow-up, submit listing agreement

logs.m: Visited property - installed 3 cameras fully covered. Electricians reconnected. Drywall complete, second paint finishing up. Flooring starts tomorrow. Water meter 1-2 days.
Drywall crew actively patching. Sent photos to Kelly. Kelly mileage approved - ACH pending. Police reports stalled.
Cleanup active - floor demo complete, drywall cut, new drywall on site ready. Utility providers confirmed. Email sent to Kelly with utility info.
Met Matt Toney (HouzzPro/San Antonio Remodeling) in his office. Connected Matt directly with Jerry Sadler at Priority Bank by phone. Work starts by following Monday.

deals.title: Mike & Alice Howell - Buyer Search
deals.notes: Rental being sold. Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal (too much for them). Pivoting to new construction search. No HOA required. Pre-approved ~$122K with Zach Schaphorst.
deals.next: Revisit new construction search, identify builders, confirm Zach pre-approval status

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal - too much for them. Still actively searching. Isaac updated. Josh LT asked if still interested.
New direction: Isaac brought wholesale 301 W Saxet, Corpus at $85K. Two structures - FHA 203k angle. Zach S evaluating. Mike/Alice connected with Isaac. LT flagged as financing partner.
Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy for new construction browsing. Hopefully they engage while pre-approval sorts out.
Text from Mike - rental being sold, rents going up. 916 Marriott assessed - foundation issues, 2011 roof - pass. Introduced new construction idea - they open to it. Pivoting entirely.

deals.title: Jimbo Stringer - 8527 Green Bliss Rental
deals.notes: Rental listing arrangement concluded. Property in Grace Gardens (Lennar). Jimbo backed out. Payment of $500 received to cover time and money invested. Ended professionally on good terms.

logs.m: Release sent to Jimbo acknowledging payment received. Relationship intact - closed out clean.
Jimbo backed out of rental listing arrangement. Chris sent $500 to cover costs. Skyslope listing to be cleared.
Visited property - floor not repaired. Possible foundation crack spotted. Excessive sealant on shingles, gaps under drip rail noted.

Spoke today - sick grandkid, not right time. Warm conversation. Follow up Apr 30.
4 days since last text - no response yet. Still hot - VA loan eligibility + motivation strong.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - helped Brandon get started in RE. Two opportunities: (1) Rental listing Green Bliss property with uncle Jimbo (now closed out), (2) Mom Milagros buyer for new construction Grace Gardens/area. Budget $50K down, ~$1,000/mo target payment.

logs.m: Builder outreach in progress. Price point strategy across multiple rate scenarios (5.6% to 1.9%). Rate buydowns critical to qualifying power.
Buyer rep sent to Milagros - not yet signed. Builder outreach template drafted. Not locked to Grace Gardens - pull options from all builders.
Brandon message sent Apr 28. Keeping simple - PM options this week, then sync.
